message:
feat(fwc): add --no-examples flag, fix zone violation capability reporting, fix MCP connector slug resolution

CLI:
- New --no-examples flag on ExportToolsArgs allows independent control
  of example inclusion (previously coupled to --no-hints).  Extracted
  export_tools_options() helper to DRY up ExportOptions construction.
- Extracted serve_mcp_config() helper that resolves the connector
  filter from the selected connector's slug rather than the raw CLI
  argument, ensuring canonical IDs like "fcp.github:enterprise:v1"
  correctly filter using the short slug "github".

Bug fix:
- zone_violation_error() in serve_mcp.rs was setting required_capability
  to tool.name() (the display name) instead of the actual capability
  from tool.annotations.capability.  Fixed to extract the annotated
  capability string.

Tests:
- --no-examples options builder and CLI parse tests
- serve_mcp_config_uses_resolved_slug_for_canonical_connector_selector
- handle_tools_call_zone_violation_reports_annotated_required_capability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
